title: Source locations for some elements are missing or off by 1
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
```
module top(input a, output reg q);
	always @*
		if (1'b1)
			q = !a;
endmodule
```

## Actual behavior

`read_verilog -dump_ast1` gives:

```
    AST_MODULE <if.v:1.1-5.10> [0x55aa0194cf20] str='\top'
      AST_WIRE <if.v:1.18-1.19> [0x55aa0194c2e0] str='\a' input port=1
      AST_WIRE <if.v:1.32-1.33> [0x55aa0194c680] str='\q' output reg port=2
      AST_ALWAYS <if.v:2.2-4.11> [0x55aa0194c7c0]
        AST_BLOCK <if.v:2.11-4.11> [0x55aa0194c900]
          AST_CASE <if.v:3.3-4.11> [0x55aa0194cb80]
            AST_REDUCE_BOOL <if.v:0.0-0.0> [0x55aa01945de0]
              AST_CONSTANT <if.v:0.0-0.0> [0x55aa0194ca40] bits='1'(1) range=[0:0] int=1
            AST_COND <if.v:3.7-3.11> [0x55aa0194c1a0]
              AST_CONSTANT <if.v:0.0-0.0> [0x55aa019471d0] bits='1'(1) range=[0:0] int=1
              AST_BLOCK <if.v:4.4-4.11> [0x55aa0194cde0]
                AST_ASSIGN_EQ <if.v:4.4-4.10> [0x55aa0194bf20]
                  AST_IDENTIFIER <if.v:4.4-4.5> [0x55aa01947860] str='\q'
                  AST_LOGIC_NOT <if.v:4.8-4.10> [0x55aa0194bde0]
                    AST_IDENTIFIER <if.v:4.9-4.10> [0x55aa01947d40] str='\a'
```
## Expected behavior

`AST_IDENTIFIER <if.v:4.9-4.10> [0x55aa01947d40] str='\a'` should be `AST_IDENTIFIER <if.v:4.9-4.9> [0x55aa01947d40] str='\a'`

`AST_BLOCK <if.v:4.4-4.11> [0x55aa0194cde0]` should be `AST_BLOCK <if.v:4.4-4.9> [0x55aa0194cde0]`.  4.11 is an invalid location.  This is actually an off-by-two error, but probably just two compounded off-by-one errors.

## Credit

Thanks to @daveshah1 for the example.

      AST_WIRE <if.v:1.32-1.33> [0x55aa0194c680] str='\q' output reg port=2
      AST_ALWAYS <if.v:2.2-4.11> [0x55aa0194c7c0]
        AST_BLOCK <if.v:2.11-4.11> [0x55aa0194c900]
          AST_CASE <if.v:3.3-4.11> [0x55aa0194cb80]
            AST_REDUCE_BOOL <if.v:0.0-0.0> [0x55aa01945de0]
              AST_CONSTANT <if.v:0.0-0.0> [0x55aa0194ca40] bits='1'(1) range=[0:0] int=1
            AST_COND <if.v:3.7-3.11> [0x55aa0194c1a0]
              AST_CONSTANT <if.v:0.0-0.0> [0x55aa019471d0] bits='1'(1) range=[0:0] int=1
              AST_BLOCK <if.v:4.4-4.11> [0x55aa0194cde0]
                AST_ASSIGN_EQ <if.v:4.4-4.10> [0x55aa0194bf20]
                  AST_IDENTIFIER <if.v:4.4-4.5> [0x55aa01947860] str='\q'
                  AST_LOGIC_NOT <if.v:4.8-4.10> [0x55aa0194bde0]
                    AST_IDENTIFIER <if.v:4.9-4.10> [0x55aa01947d40] str='\a'
